description: Institutional once-per-cycle capitulation buy signal. State machine NULL->WARM->ARMED->FIRED->COOLDOWN based on VIX9D/VIX/VIX3M term structure + VVIX panic gauge. Emits retail trade ticket + forward 1m/3m/12m expected returns computed live from 20y SPY history at curated historical analogues. 3x daily MON-FRI.
